steps.name: When  I add "LYRASIS Reads" account from welcomeScreen
And  I enter credentials for 'LYRASIS Reads' account
And  I search 'available' book of distributor 'Palace Marketplace' and bookType 'EBOOK' from "LYRASIS Reads" and save as 'bookNameInfo'
And  I switch to 'eBooks' catalog tab
And  Open EBOOK book with GET action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
And  Click GET action button on book details screen
Then  EBOOK book with READ action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo is present on books screen
steps.statusMessage: 'The Three Languages' book with specific action button is not present on books screen
steps.statusTrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: 'The Three Languages' book with specific action button is not present on books screen
	at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89)
	at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42)
	at stepdefinitions.BooksSteps.isBookPresent(BooksSteps.java:93)
	at ✽.EBOOK book with READ action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo is present on books screen(file:///home/runner/work/mobile-integration-tests/mobile-integration-tests/src/test/java/features/MyBooks.feature:135)

steps.name: When  Open EBOOK book with READ action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo on books screen
And  Click RETURN button but cancel the action by clicking CANCEL button on the alert
Then  EBOOK book with READ action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo is present on books screen
